meaning: n.耶和华(犹太教神名的基督教读法)
examples: I have come to sacrifice to Jehovah.
Faith clothes me with the power of Jehovah.
Other stones he found bore the Hebrew letters YHVH, for Jehovah, or God.
Lesley Shelley is a paid member of the UCU but says her Jehovah's Witness faith prevents her from striking.
Lady still managed to scrounge a couple hours here and there to hang with her new main man, Jehovah.
